prestazioni: Upgrade the turbocharged 1.5L MGE (engine code: M15C6T) with a Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbocharger, paired with a custom 3-inch downpipe and a Milltek Sport 76mm titanium cat-back exhaust system for optimized spool and reduced backpressure

Install a Syvecs S6Plus standalone ECU with a custom-tuned map targeting 400+ HP, incorporating a 4-bar MAP sensor, ethanol content sensor, and launch control for the 7-speed DCT transmission with upgraded Sachs Performance clutch and dual-mass flywheel

Fit a PWR radiator with dual 12-inch SPAL fans, an upgraded intercooler from Wagner Tuning (EVO2), and a Forge Motorsport 3-port boost solenoid to manage intake temperatures and prevent heat soak under sustained high-load conditions
estetica: Apply a full Rocket Bunny Pandem widebody kit (MG4-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and gloss black accents on the roof and mirrors

Install OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 19x9.5 ET35 wheels with 245/35 R19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, complemented by KW Suspension Variant 3 coilovers with adjustable camber plates and Eibach anti-roll bars for aggressive stance and track-ready handling

Fit a custom front bumper lip from Seibon Carbon, a carbon fiber rear wing from APR Performance (GT-250 model), and a full LED lighting upgrade with LUX H8 V4 bulbs and sequential turn signals from VLEDS for a race-inspired aesthetic
